intro.p1: We specialize in tailored design and renovation services for apartments, single-family homes, condominiums, and townhouses, transforming everyday spaces into personalized havens. Our expertise spans comprehensive kitchen and bathroom upgrades, including custom cabinetry, premium countertops, appliance integration, and enhanced lighting and ventilation.
intro.p2: We also handle structural modifications such as wall removal or addition, staircase redesign, and door/window repositioning to improve flow and functionality. With a focus on space optimization, we reimagine layouts, create multi-functional zones, and implement smart storage solutions. Whether you're looking to modernize your interiors or expand usable space, our team combines design innovation with construction excellence to deliver results that elevate your lifestyle.

sections.title: Kitchen & Bathroom Upgrades
items: Custom design or replacement of cabinetry
Countertop upgrades – quartz, marble, porcelain slab, etc.
Sink, faucet, and hardware replacement
Appliance installation and space optimization
Vanity, mirror cabinet, and storage upgrades
Walk-in Shower/tub replacement and waterproofing
Lighting, ventilation, and heating improvements

sections.title: Structural Modifications
items: Wall removal or addition
Structural reinforcement
Door/window relocation or resizing
New staircase installation or modification
Interior additions or extensions

sections.title: Space Optimization
items: Re-planning floor layouts
Custom storage solutions
Multi-functional space design – study, guest room, home office
Open-plan and enclosed space conversions
Traffic flow and natural lighting optimization
Acoustic and soundproofing enhancements

intro.p1: Y&Y Construction specializes in providing comprehensive renovation services for commercial spaces such as offices, restaurants, and schools. We are committed to tailoring solutions for each project to ensure that every detail meets our clients' expectations.
intro.p2: With a strong reputation across Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, and surrounding areas, our services include but are not limited to:

sections.title: Office Renovation
items: Full management from concept design to completion, strictly controlling timeline, budget, and quality standards.
Design teams creating environments that balance aesthetics and function, reflecting brand identity and optimizing space efficiency.
Professional teams handling partitions, flooring, ceilings, and finishing works.
Ergonomic custom office furniture solutions based on layout and employee needs.
Sustainable materials and energy-saving systems to support green building certifications.

sections.title: Restaurant Renovation
items: Immersive dining spaces designed to reflect brand DNA and enhance customer experience.
Optimized kitchen workflows, collaborating with chefs and suppliers for equipment placement 100% compliant with health codes.
Layered lighting design for specific atmospheres, from casual cafes to high-end restaurants.
Custom booths, bars, and display units integrating functionality and art.
Assistance with building permits, fire inspections, and health licenses for a compliant opening.

sections.title: School Renovation
items: Tailored classrooms, libraries, and public areas for different age groups, focusing on engagement and safety.
Modular teaching environments supporting both traditional lectures and collaborative learning models.
Specialized areas like science labs, maker spaces, and art studios to inspire innovation.
Highly durable, low-maintenance materials that withstand high traffic while staying clean and professional.
Compliance with fire codes, ADA standards, and child safety regulations.

sections.title: Retail Store Renovation
items: Store designs that reflect brand identity and boost customer retention through immersive shopping experiences.
Innovative shelving and display fixtures combined with traffic flow planning to maximize exposure.
Premium, wear-resistant materials ensuring the store remains pristine over time.
Functional checkout layouts integrated with smart payment systems for better transaction efficiency.
100% compliance with fire codes, accessibility standards, and commercial safety regulations.

sections.title: Central Kitchen & Showroom
items: Functional zoning for central kitchens (prep/cooking/cleaning separation) compliant with hygiene regulations.
Heat-resistant, anti-bacterial stainless steel materials for food safety.
Narrative-driven showroom spaces for immersive brand storytelling.
Integrated systems: plumbing, electrical, and high-capacity ventilation.
Compliance with fire, food safety, and restaurant building standards.

intro.p1: We offer comprehensive architectural and interior construction drawing services for both residential and commercial projects, covering everything from floor plans and elevations to structural, electrical, and material specifications. Our detailed drawings include cabinetry, stairs, doors, windows, and decorative elements, ensuring seamless coordination between fabrication and on-site execution.
intro.p2: In addition, we provide end-to-end support for building permit applications, change-of-use submissions, and city approval processes. Whether you're planning a new build, renovation, or structural modification, we prepare and review all necessary documentation to meet local codes and zoning bylaws. Our team handles municipal submissions, follows up on approval progress, and communicates directly with city departments to resolve inquiries.

sections.title: Architectural & Interior Construction Drawings
sections.description: We provide a full set of professional construction drawing services for both residential and commercial projects, including:
items: Floor Plans – Indicating walls, doors, windows, furniture, and circulation flow.
Elevations – Showcasing heights, proportions, and decorative details.
Sections – Illustrating structural layers, spatial relationships, and internal assemblies.
Detail Drawings – Specifics for cabinetry, stairs, doors, windows, and trims.
Structural Drawings – Dimensions and construction details for beams, columns, slabs, and foundations.
Electrical Plans – Layouts for outlets, lighting, switches, and low-voltage systems.
Material & Finish Schedules – Specifications, color codes, and installation methods.
Millwork & Shop Drawings – For fabrication and precise on-site coordination.

sections.title: Building Permits & City Approvals Assistance
sections.description: We provide one-stop service from application to approval for residential and commercial projects, ensuring compliance and smooth execution, including:
items: Preparation and review of all necessary architectural and engineering documents.
Submission of building permit and change-of-use applications to local municipalities.
Coordination with city planners, inspectors, and relevant departments.
Resolving zoning bylaws inquiries and providing supplemental materials.
Assistance with revision applications during the construction phase.
Guidance through each stage of the approval timeline for a smooth transition to groundbreaking.

intro.p1: Y & Y Construction provides comprehensive commercial general contracting services, focusing on offering one-stop solutions for various commercial projects in Vancouver and surrounding cities. We turn your vision into reality with professional support and high-quality services.
intro.p2: Our project management services cover the following key aspects:

sections.title: Project Planning and Management
items: Full-service from initial project planning to construction management.
Close collaboration to understand your needs and vision.
Detailed planning and construction plans.
Monitoring progress, coordinating resources, ensuring on-time, high-quality completion.

sections.title: Consultation and Construction
items: Experienced construction team providing professional advice for commercial spaces.
Ensuring every detail meets high standards of craftsmanship.
Building commercial spaces that are both beautiful and functional.

sections.title: Infrastructure Development
items: Comprehensive infrastructure services including plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and gas systems.
Ensuring safety and compliance with industry standards for seamless operations.

paragraphs: Y&Y Design Build is a Vancouver-based full-service design and construction firm, specializing in both commercial and residential renovations. With over a decade of local industry experience and a team of more than 30 full-time professionals, we deliver comprehensive, one-stop solutions from concept to completion.

As a licensed general contractor with an in-house design team, we understand the importance of balancing aesthetics with functional layout. Our designers and builders work closely together to ensure every project is executed true to the original vision—this is the essence of our motto: "Your Vision, Our Mission - Do it!"
Over the past ten years, we have successfully delivered hundreds of projects across Greater Vancouver, spanning restaurants, retail stores, office spaces, and residential properties.

Our full-service offering covers design, permitting, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, gas, kitchen and bathroom construction, custom millwork, and soft furnishing. We focus on timely delivery and quality workmanship, ensuring your space is ready for business or move-in as planned. We also provide comprehensive warranty and post-project support for peace of mind.
At Y&Y, we don't just build spaces - we bring your vision to life. Get in touch with us to start your transformation.
aboutUs.clientsTitle: Some of our past clients include:

facilities.title: Reasonable Prices
facilities.description: We guarantee transparent pricing, clear quotes and timelines, and our prices are below the market average.

facilities.title: Exclusive Design
facilities.description: Mixture of imagination, experience and professionalism is the secret of our design!

facilities.title: Professional Team
facilities.description: We are proud of our amicable, professional and always developing team!

visionMission.sectionSubtitle: A behind the scenes look at
visionMission.sectionDescription: Our portfolio showcases a diverse range of projects, from beautifully crafted residential spaces to functional and stylish commercial interiors.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We believe that well-designed spaces have the power to transform lives - shaping how people feel, work, and connect. Our vision is to create interiors that authentically reflect each client's individuality, seamlessly blending comfort, function, and beauty. By marrying timeless aesthetics with modern innovation, we design environments that are both visually striking and deeply practical.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to create exceptional interior designs that elevate everyday living by prioritizing comfort, functionality, and aesthetics. We strive to craft spaces that are not only visually captivating but also thoughtfully tailored to each client's unique needs and lifestyle. Through a commitment to design innovation, we ensure every project strikes the ideal balance between style and purpose.

questions.q: What types of commercial renovations do you provide?
questions.a: We offer renovation services for offices, restaurants, schools, retail spaces, central kitchens, and showrooms. Our scope includes design, construction, infrastructure upgrades, and interior finishes.
We primarily serve Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, and surrounding cities in the Lower Mainland.

questions.q: How long do your projects typically take?
questions.a: Timelines depend on project scope and complexity. We always provide a detailed schedule before starting and commit to delivering on time without compromising quality.

questions.q: How do you ensure construction quality?
questions.a: Our experienced team follows strict quality control protocols, uses premium materials, and adheres to industry best practices. We also offer comprehensive warranty support.
Our pricing is based on project scale, complexity, and specific requirements. A detailed quote is provided before the project begins to ensure full transparency.
Yes. Our dedicated in-house design team creates tailored solutions based on your vision, functionality needs, and aesthetic preferences.
Absolutely. We provide full after-sales service including warranty coverage and continued technical support beyond project handover.

questions.q: What kinds of infrastructure work do you handle?
questions.a: We provide plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and gas system installation and upgrades to ensure your space is fully operational and up to code.

questions.q: How do I start working with Y&Y Construction?
questions.a: Simply contact us via phone, email, or our website. We'll arrange an initial consultation to understand your goals and prepare a project plan and quote.

questions.q: Do you have examples of completed projects?
questions.a: Yes. Notable completed projects include Big Way Hot Pot, Myth Szechuan Cuisine, Tasty BBQ & Beer Bar, Hikvision Vancouver Office, Real Fruit Bubble Tea, and Happy Lamb Hotpot.

ourTeam.subtitle: Creative minds always
ourTeam.description: We offer a range of bespoke interior design services tailored to your unique needs. From concept development to final installation.

intro.p1: Our Tear-down & Rebuild service offers a complete transformation of outdated properties into modern, high-performance homes or investment assets. From demolition and site preparation to architectural planning and full-scale construction, we manage every step.
intro.p2: Whether you're rebuilding your dream home or developing for resale, our team ensures seamless permitting, structural optimization, and tailored design.

sections.title: Demolition & Site Preparation
items: Coordinating utility disconnection and relocation.
Handling hazardous materials responsibly under strict safety protocols.
Soil assessment and foundation preparation for optimal stability.
Erosion control and drainage planning for long-term durability.

sections.title: Architectural Planning & Design
items: Collaboration with engineers and consultants for code compliance.
Designs that balance beauty with practicality and function.
3D renderings and walkthroughs to help visualize your future space.
Tailoring plans to local zoning and environmental requirements.

sections.title: Permitting & Regulatory Approvals
items: Efficient handling of complex municipal approval processes.
Assistance with variance or change-of-use applications.
Staying updated on local regulations to ensure project continuity.
Direct communication with city departments to resolve inquiries.
